/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/cc -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/client.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/connection.c.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/log.c.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/protocol.c.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/des.c.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/map_point.c.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/command.c.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/config.c.o -o client
